generated_exposure.exposure_text: Retired Admiral James Whitmore, who served 30 years in strategic defense planning, just warned that 'our current approach to strategic autonomy is dangerously naive.' He points out that while we focus on symbolic independence, real security comes from reliable alliances. 'We can't afford to gamble with our safety by chasing political fantasies,' he stated in a recent security forum. As someone who's seen firsthand how these policies play out, I trust his judgment more than partisan talking points. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
